summary: A single static wide pool-camera shot in daylight of President Trump greeting Chinese President Xi Jinping on the steps of the Great Hall of the People; the two shake hands, exchange brief words, and stand for cameras alongside aides, with a red carpet at the base of the stone steps. It is raw, unedited event footage with ambient sound, no cuts, no music, no graphics, and no stylized/cinematic treatment. The borderline music_score reflects ambient/crowd noise, not a song; it does not fit the produced youth-appeal genre-experiment criteria.
notable_text: Tweet text: '.@POTUS greets Chinese President Xi Jinping at the Great Hall of the People'. No on-screen graphics or slogans.
